summary: Frontend-only iteration 2 testing. Verified all photographic backgrounds (FBAM ice, kelp on /liquid + dry-meal donut, ocean on WSP, soil on both granulate panels) load and render with naturalWidth>0. New Recharts donut (7 sectors + 7 legend rows) and bar chart (8 species bars) render correctly under data-testid 'feed-composition-donut' and 'feed-dose-bar'. Plus Jakarta Sans is loaded across all inner pages (visible in document.fonts) and applied to .eyebrow elements via computed style. Sub-nav anchors scroll correctly, liquid tabs swap, FAQ accordion toggles, mailto links use McLir@Sea-Weed.DE. No console errors, no broken images.
critical_code_review_comments: document.fonts.check('1em "Plus Jakarta Sans"') returns false because the @import only ships weights 500/600/700/800 — calling check() with default weight 400 misses; check('500 12px "Plus Jakarta Sans"') returns true and font is enumerated in document.fonts. This is a benign quirk, not a bug.
All four decorative panel photos load with naturalWidth=900 (or 1600 for the wide cows pasture). All alt attributes are empty strings (decorative) — appropriate.

AnimalFeeding.jsx is now ~565 lines with two embedded charts; consider splitting COMPOSITION_PIE/FEEDING_BAR + chart components into /src/components/feed-charts.jsx for maintainability if more visualisations are added.
FBAM panel correctly stacks: photo → dark gradient → radial highlight → snowflake decorations → text content. Text contrast is good (white on darkened photo).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 verified. Photo URLs in use: FBAM ice photo-1551582045-6ec9c11d8697, kelp/ocean photo-1567001847230-ed5da95bd055 (used on /liquid AND /animal-feeding dry-meal donut backdrop), WSP photo-1697817315238-788e8a16def4, granulate soil photo-1466692476868-aef1dfb1e735, cows pasture photo-1659148566517-9dfe52f802ac (hero + feeding-dose bar backdrop). Recharts donut renders 7 path sectors + 7 legend <li>; bar chart renders 8 species bars (16 path elements counted because each Bar produces a <path> + label group). Sub-nav requires clicking anchor (page.click('[data-testid="feed-subnav-{id}"]')) instead of relying on hash navigation. Plus Jakarta Sans loaded with weights 500-800; use check('500 12px ...') not check('1em ...').
